steps.title: Find the singular subject
steps.content: The subject is "each one of a ghazal's couplets." The phrase "of a ghazal's couplets" is prepositional, so the head of the subject remains the singular phrase "each one."

steps.title: Use singular agreement
steps.content: B is past plural, C is plural, and D is present plural. The remaining verb is singular and agrees with "each one" in the present-tense sentence. The answer is A.
